title: Samvaad 2016 – A Tribal Cultural Conclave
abstract: Presented the paper Chronic Pain and Health Seeking Among the Bhils of Udaipur District at Samvaad, a national tribal cultural conclave organised by Tata Steel CSR. The presentation explored indigenous understandings of chronic pain and the health-seeking practices of Bhil communities in Rajasthan, contributing to broader conversations on tribal health, resilience, and culturally rooted care systems.
